Package org.finos.fluxnova.bpm.model.bpmn.instance.fluxnova

Interface FluxnovaTaskListener

All Superinterfaces:
BpmnModelElementInstance, ModelElementInstance
All Known Implementing Classes:
FluxnovaTaskListenerImpl
public interface FluxnovaTaskListener extends BpmnModelElementInstance
The BPMN taskListener camunda extension element
Author:
Sebastian Menski
